title: @27upon2: A must read for orgs looking to get into RL but worried about repackaging your a...
rawContent:
Tweet by @27upon2 (Sriraam)
Author bio: founding engineer @decodetool. playing with RL envs. prev @Harvard
Text: A must read for orgs looking to get into RL but worried about repackaging your app into a neat Reinforcement Learning environment. 

You don’t need to! Your product can be used as the environment. 

Even if you have a fancy nextjs app with an elixir backend running on a single mysql db you can RL on it!
